data.body:
IMPLEMENTATION NOTES (experimentally validated in sandbox, 2026-06-09):
Three one-kwarg threads, all validated: _reads.py list_tickets gains exclude_deleted: bool = False and passes it to reduce_all_tickets (replacing the hardcoded False); __init__.py list_tickets and mcp_server.py list_tickets gain the same param and pass through. Validated against a temp store with a deleted ticket: all four flag combos x three surfaces agree exactly (CLI as oracle). Regression: test_mcp.py, test_surface.py, test_native_read_parity.py, test_cli.py -> 49 passed.
SEMANTIC NOTE (include in the parity test): delete writes STATUS(deleted)+ARCHIVED, so the DEFAULT list already hides tombstones via archived-exclusion; the flag only changes results when combined with include_archived=True. Defaults preserve every existing caller.
